about.introTitle: Where the Orient meets the Silver Coast
about.introText1: Soulac Impérial was born from a simple idea: bring the precision of Japanese cuisine and the warmth of Chinese cooking together, in a setting that feels like the seaside towns we love — relaxed, sun-washed, unhurried.
about.introText2: Behind every plate is a search for balance: clean, vibrant flavours, carefully sourced ingredients, and a dining room designed to feel like an extension of the beach outside — refined without ever feeling stiff.
about.introText3: From the careful slicing of the fish to the roaring flame of the wok, our chefs carry on gestures passed down through generations. Here, the traditions of Asia converse with the Atlantic tides: a living cuisine, in step with the seasons and the catch of the day.
about.philosophyQuote: A meal should taste like a holiday — generous, a little surprising, and never rushed.
about.valuesSubtitle: Four ideas behind everything we serve
about.value1Text: Japanese precision and Chinese generosity, reimagined with a contemporary, seasonal touch.
about.value2Text: Fish, vegetables and herbs chosen daily for their freshness, prepared with respect for their flavour.
about.value3Text: An address rooted in Soulac-sur-Mer, where every visit carries a hint of the ocean and holiday ease.
about.value4Text: Attentive, unpretentious service — the kind that makes a chic evening feel effortless.
about.ctaText: Reserve a table and discover a menu that travels between Tokyo, Canton and the Atlantic coast.

home.introTitle: A touch of the Orient on the Silver Coast
home.introText1: In the heart of Soulac-sur-Mer, steps from the ocean, Soulac Impérial brings together the best of Chinese and Japanese cuisine in a chic, relaxed setting. Sushi, dim sum, fragrant wok dishes and grilled specialities, to enjoy inside, on the terrace, or to take away.
home.introText2: An open kitchen, carefully sourced ingredients and attentive service make every visit a refined experience, where Asian tradition meets seaside living.
home.specialtiesSubtitle: A travelling menu, between Tokyo, Canton and the Atlantic Ocean
home.specialty1Text: A selection of sushi, maki and sashimi prepared to order with carefully chosen fish.
home.specialty2Text: Ginger-flamed wok dishes, lacquered duck and charcoal-grilled yakitori skewers.
home.specialty3Text: Slow-simmered broths, fresh noodles and comforting miso soup.
home.specialty4Text: Steamed dumplings, crispy spring rolls and sharing bites to start the meal.
home.specialty5Text: Fresh shrimp, squid and shellfish, elevated with Asian spices.
home.specialty6Text: Mochi, coconut pearls and a fine tea selection to end the meal on a sweet note.
home.clickCollectText: Scan the QR code at your table or from home to browse our menu, build your order and pick it up at the time of your choice with Click & Collect.
home.rouletteTitle: Spin the wheel, try your luck
home.rouletteText: Once a day, spin the Imperial Wheel for a chance to win a discount, a free drink or a free dessert on your next order.
home.ctaText: Enjoy an ocean view and exceptional cuisine. Booking recommended, especially on weekends and during the season.
home.menuPreviewSubtitle: A glimpse of our menu. Prices for takeaway (Click & Collect) or dine-in.
home.seaTitle: The East, with its feet in the Atlantic
home.seaText: A few steps from the great beach and the Belle Époque villas, Soulac Impérial blends the culinary art of Asia with the light and sea spray of the Silver Coast. A rare interlude, between ocean and refinement.
home.galleryTitle: For the eye and the palate
home.gallerySubtitle: A few moments from our table, between Eastern tradition and Atlantic sea air.

testimonials.quote: An exceptional address in Soulac. The plating is sublime and the flavours of rare finesse. It feels like Tokyo, facing the ocean.
testimonials.author: Camille R.

testimonials.quote: The best sushi on the coast. Impeccable service, refined setting and faultlessly fresh produce. We will be back.
testimonials.author: Antoine M.

testimonials.quote: A journey from Canton to Kyoto without leaving the Silver Coast. Each dish is a work of art. Special mention to the lacquered duck.
testimonials.author: Sophie L.

menu.clickCollectNote: Build your order below and pick it up at the time of your choice with Click & Collect, or enjoy table service inside and on our ocean-view terrace.
menu.tableBanner: You're ordering for Table {{number}} — your dishes will be served straight to your table.

s2.name: Mixed Nigiri
s2.desc: 6 pieces: salmon, tuna and shrimp on vinegared rice.

s3.name: Imperial Platter
s3.desc: 12 pieces of assorted sashimi, our signature selection.

m1.name: California Salmon-Avocado
m1.desc: Salmon, avocado and cucumber roll with sesame seeds.

m2.name: Spicy Tuna Roll
m2.desc: Spicy tuna roll with house-made sriracha sauce.

m3.name: Dragon Roll
m3.desc: Grilled eel, avocado, cucumber and toasted sesame.

d1.name: Har Gow
d1.desc: Steamed shrimp dumplings in traditional translucent wrappers (4 pieces).

d2.name: Gyoza
d2.desc: Pan-fried pork and cabbage dumplings, ponzu sauce (5 pieces).

d3.name: Chicken Spring Rolls
d3.desc: Crispy chicken and vermicelli spring rolls, sweet & sour sauce (4 pieces).

w1.name: Ginger Beef Wok
w1.desc: Stir-fried beef with fresh ginger, peppers and spring onions.

w2.name: Lacquered Duck
w2.desc: Honey-soy glazed duck breast with crisp vegetables.

w3.name: Stir-Fried Vegetable Rice
w3.desc: Wok-fried rice with seasonal vegetables and spring onions.

y1.name: Chicken Yakitori
y1.desc: Grilled chicken skewers, soy-mirin glaze (3 pieces).

y3.name: Shrimp Tempura
y3.desc: Light battered shrimp, tentsuyu dipping sauce (5 pieces).

so1.name: Miso Soup
so1.desc: Traditional miso broth, tofu, wakame seaweed and spring onion.

so2.name: Wonton Soup
so2.desc: Fragrant broth with pork and shrimp wonton dumplings.

so3.name: Wakame Salad
so3.desc: Wakame seaweed salad, sesame and light dressing.

de1.name: Mochi Ice Cream
de1.desc: Assortment of 3 mochi ice creams, seasonal flavours.

de2.name: Coconut Pearls
de2.desc: Tapioca pearls in coconut milk with fresh fruit.

de3.name: Honey Banana Fritters
de3.desc: Crispy banana fritters, honey and sesame.

dr1.name: Jasmine / Oolong Tea
dr1.desc: Hot or iced tea, jasmine or oolong selection.

dr2.name: Yuzu Lemonade
dr2.desc: House-made yuzu lemonade, fresh and zesty.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.promoInvalid: Invalid, expired or already used code.

errors.contact: Please provide an email or phone number.
errors.closed: The restaurant is closed on this day. Please choose another date.

cart.confirmInstructions: Show this reference when you arrive. You can also send it to us by email to make sure we receive it.
cart.confirmTableInstructions: Your order has been sent to the kitchen. A member of staff will bring it to your table shortly.

reservation.intro: Book your table in a few clicks. For groups of more than 8 or private events, please contact us directly by email.
reservation.groupsNote: A confirmation will be sent to you. All bookings are subject to availability.
reservation.policyShort: Your table is held for 15 minutes after the booked time, then released.
reservation.policyText: Your table is held for 15 minutes after the reserved time. After that, if you have not arrived and we have not heard from you, the reservation is automatically cancelled and the table may be reassigned. Please let us know if you are running late — we will do our best to seat you.

errors.contact: Please provide an email or phone number.
errors.closed: The restaurant is closed on this day. Please choose another date.

reservation.confirmInstructions: We will get back to you shortly to confirm your table. You can also send it to us by email to make sure we receive it. Reminder: your table is held for 15 minutes after the reserved time.

roulette.intro: Once a day, spin the wheel for a chance to win a discount or a tasty gift to use on your next Click & Collect order or in the restaurant. One spin per day and per device.
roulette.noWinMessage: No luck this time... Come back tomorrow for another try!
roulette.useInstructions: Show this code at checkout or enter it in your Click & Collect cart before placing your order. Valid for 7 days.
roulette.alreadyPlayed: You've already played today. Come back tomorrow for a new gift!

contact.pageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.intro: Questions, special requests or private events? Send us a message and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.confirmInstructions: We will get back to you as soon as possible. You can also send it to us by email to make sure we receive it.

qrCodes.pageSubtitle: Print and place one code per table for in-room ordering.
qrCodes.instructions: Each code links directly to the menu for its table, so guests can order from their seat with Click & Collect-style ordering — served straight to the table.

items.text: An unforgettable experience facing the ocean. The imperial platter is remarkably fresh and the service of rare elegance.
items.author: Camille R.

items.text: The most refined Chinese-Japanese fusion on the coast. Every plate is a work of art, from the first sushi to the last mochi.
items.author: Antoine M.

items.text: Superb setting and delicate cuisine. The lacquered duck was perfect. Do book on weekends, it is very popular.
items.author: Sophie L.

items.text: Click & Collect is flawless: order ready on time, careful packaging, flavours intact. Our Friday-night address.
items.author: Julien & Clara

items.text: A journey between Tokyo and Canton, with your feet in the sand. Warm welcome and a truly chic atmosphere.
items.author: Inès K.

items.text: Impeccable produce and refined plating. You can feel the love of detail. We will definitely be back.
items.author: Marc D.

sections.p: This site is published by Soulac Impérial (SARL), with a capital of €10,000, registered office at 1 Rue el Burgo de Osma, 33780 Soulac-sur-Mer, France. SIRET: 900 123 456 00012 · Bordeaux Trade Register 900 123 456 · VAT: FR12 900123456. Email: contact@soulacimperial.fr.
The publication director is the manager of Soulac Impérial.
The site is hosted by OVH SAS, 2 rue Kellermann, 59100 Roubaix, France — ovh.com.

All content (text, images, logos, visual identity) on this site is the property of Soulac Impérial or their respective authors and is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, even partial, is forbidden without prior written consent.
Concept, design and development of the site: ody.
When using the reservation, order (Click & Collect) and contact forms, we only collect the necessary data: name, email address, phone number and the information related to your request.
This data is used solely to handle your reservations, orders and requests, and to get back to you. It is never sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
Your data is kept only as long as necessary to process your request, then deleted or archived in line with applicable regulations.
Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and object to your data. To exercise these rights, write to us at contact@soulacimperial.fr.
This site only uses technical cookies required for its operation and to remember your preferences (language). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

footer.tagline: Chinese-Japanese fusion facing the ocean. Refined cuisine, relaxed atmosphere, in Soulac-sur-Mer.
